summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rate Limiting Strategy Analyzer. Backend APIs mostly functional with one issue in run-all endpoint. Frontend loads correctly with dark theme but has critical React infinite loop error during Run All experiments.

critical_bugs.issue: Only returns 1 strategy result instead of all 3 strategies (no_limit, fixed_window, sliding_window)
critical_bugs.impact: Comparison functionality incomplete - users cannot see full strategy comparison

ui_bugs.issue: React 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error when Run All button is clicked
ui_bugs.selector: Entire application crashes with infinite loop
ui_bugs.error_details: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component repeatedly calls setState inside componentWillUpdate or componentDidUpdate

integration_issues.issue: Frontend crashes when Run All is triggered, preventing comparison table and analysis from displaying

passed_tests: Backend data endpoint (/api/data) with rate limiting
Backend rate limiting behavior (returns 200 and 429 codes)
Frontend loads with dark theme and cyan/teal accents
Control panel with strategy dropdown, sliders, and buttons
Charts render with time series data

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (major functionality works but Run All crashes)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix React infinite loop error in Run All functionality. The error 'Maximum update depth exceeded' suggests setState is being called repeatedly in component lifecycle methods. Also fix backend run-all endpoint to return all 3 strategies instead of just 1.
